feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Nowhere to Land
entry.summary:
Author: bloodvvitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,128Chapters: 13/25Kudos: 261

Summary: Bruce – recently injured and working a case that just won’t break – sees the tactical advantages of temporarily ‘dating’ Superman. Clark – who was almost too late to save his friend from a fatal fall – doesn’t understand what he’s signed up for. For two people who know each other so well, the World’s Finest just can’t manage to get on the same page.

entry.summary:
Author: veryextremelygay

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,545Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Superman is framed once again by Luthor. Clark, frustrated and upset, leaves Metropolis. If the JL needs him they will come to him. Batman shows up... but it's not on behalf of the JL.

entry.title: Every Billionaire has his Boy Scout Boyfriend and Adopted Acrobat Son
entry.summary:
Author: ChaosQueen1015

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,064Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Thanos won and next thing Peter knows is he's lying on the ground of some strange city called Metropolis. Not 24 hours later he's been adopted by Clark Kent also known as Superman and is figuring out how to manage this new world and redevelop his hero identity, all while working with his new best friend, Dick Grayson, to figure out how to get their dads together.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part One
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,455Chapters: 6/14Kudos: 3

Summary: Five months after disappearing, Aven Davis is running out of time—and out of places to hide. A volatile implant is the only thing keeping the queen inside him dormant, sending him straight into Metropolis and unexpectedly back into Clark Kent’s orbit.Meanwhile, Bruce Wayne’s search for Aven takes a devastating turn, revealing betrayals that put every step he’s taken under Weyland-Yutani’s gaze. With the clock ticking and danger closing in, all three men are pulled toward a collision that will decide whether Aven survives long enough to ever come home. (Please Read Ashes In The Dark part one and Two before Reading.)

entry.title: Candle Against The Wind
entry.summary:
Author: LoneChestnutTree

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,977Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 13

Summary: 'The flurry of wind does not snuff the flame from the candle, despite. But a stronger wind blows, and it does. The air is full. Something stronger than him and his misery. He does not lift his head. To his right, a figure by the archway.  Suddenly, his kneeling reverence made sense.'Bruce gets injured. Clark visits. Winter arrives. And they are in the middle of it.

entry.title: Black feathers of the night
entry.summary:
Author: Jesse29705

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,522Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 1

Summary: batman is missing as everyone is worried about it. all of the League of Justice know that he can take care of himself, but being gone for 1 week, something is very wrong, and Superman knows it. The bat family have been looking for him but with no luck as the only one that had seen batman was Superman himself, but that was one week ago. weeks passed, and nothing ever came, making Superman feel depressed and decided to fly back to his apartment to ease of his mind. while flying home, he felt a very weak, heartbeat, nearby as he decided to check it out only to encounter a injured Black Swan. (Meanwhile in the Multiverse] an evil sorcerer was teleporting in different dimensions looking for someone before arriving Batman's universe and caught a sight of his prize as his master plan will begin to take the throne And no one will get his way.

entry.title: Real Man
entry.summary:
Author: merxurie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,470Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 911

Summary: Bruce Wayne has to do it all. He has to, because he chose this path. No one forced him to be Batman, to be the CEO that Wayne Enterprises needs, to adopt Dick Grayson and love him more everyday. No one forced him into this, really. Except that he's suffocating under the weight of it all. - In which Bruce wants to be everything to everyone, but he just cannot burden others with all of him. And Clark Kent is a sucker for kind eyes and has a 'I can fix him' complex.

entry.title: Other Things We Haven’t Named
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,654Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 37

Summary: After hundreds of Sunday dinners, Clark is no longer just a welcome presence at Wayne Manor—he’s woven into its routine. As Dick grows older and the house settles into new rhythms, Bruce begins to confront how much has quietly changed. A simple dinner preparation stirs questions about belonging, trust, and what it means to stay. In the warmth of the kitchen, something unspoken edges closer to being named.

entry.title: Rest is for the Blissfully Ignorant
entry.summary:
Author: Pog_phrog97

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,601Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Everyone in Bruce's life has been pleading with him to take a break. Get some rest, let someone else take over. But crime in Gotham never slept, and so neither could he. He could never hand the responsibility of being the bat off to anyone else, not even his children. It was far too dangerous to trust anyone to carry on his work without him, even for a second.Or.A Worried Clark shows up to the streets of Gotham, on the lookout for Bruce after getting a frantic call from his children.

entry.title: I Still Remember
entry.summary:
Author: Murmeloni

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,618Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 118

Summary: Clark proposes to his girlfriend of a few months and asks Bruce to be the best man at their wedding. Bruce thinks that might just be one of the worst things to ever happen to him, but of course he agrees. It's only one day, he tells himself, it'll be over soon. Except it's not. Because Bat-Mite doesn't like to see his favorite hero sad...

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 101,421Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 533

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: How to Lose Your Virginity (And Accidentally Fall in Love)
entry.summary:
Author: breathbetween

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,698Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 63

Summary: Bruce let out a deep, tired sigh and rubbed at his temple with his glove. “Speak,” he grunted. “You- you mean that-” Clark took a sharp breath, his voice coming out thin, like air slipping from a deflating balloon. “You’re also a virgin?!” Bruce regretted engaging in this conversation instantly. It could have been such a peaceful night.  or whereBatman doesn’t do relationships. Superman is afraid he might hurt someone if he tries. So they come up with a solution. Because what could possibly go wrong with losing your virginity to your best friend? Right?

entry.title: In the Watches of the Night
entry.summary:
Author: FancomicsCombined (SummerKnight717)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 35

Summary: There are some constants even in the chaotic lives of World's Finest heroes. The Watchtower is their safe haven. The Phantom Stranger stays out of most people's business and everyone's company. With both constants proven false, and one of their best in peril, the League is led into unfamiliar territory. Fancomic. Comments of all kinds, including concrit, welcome and appreciated.

entry.title: and when i'm gone, just carry on, don't mourn, rejoice
entry.summary:
Author: dwarflover4life

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,427Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 82

Summary: He wanted to end it – had thought about doing it since his parents had passed when he was just an eight-year-old boy – but he couldn’t. When he felt this way he often thought of his oldest son, Dick, and his butler Alfred. And Clark. And that’s why he’s decided to draft up a new will and a contingency plan of sorts. He already had many in place, but this would be the final one – he needed to make it count. So that when he ended it all, everything would go smoothly, and they could all forget about Bruce and finally be happy. It was the perfect solution. Everything could be fixed with a plan. At the start of January in the new year he would be a dead man.   (title inspired by 'When I'm Gone' by Eminem)

entry.title: Chew until it bleeds
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,340Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 96

Summary: Kal-El warned Bruce of what would happen if he didn't follow the rules. Yet, the stubborn bat still took to the streets, breaking his rules one by one. Now, Bruce needs to learn that his actions do have consequences, and Kal-El is more than ready to teach that lesson. *Can be read standalone*

entry.title: 1 day later
entry.summary:
Author: AKU_FOX

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,993Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Billy Batson is confused, scared. He just wants everything to go back to normal and maybe he’s not the only one.   Or The dc and Marvel crossover no one asked for, that revolves around a apocalypse.
